rootCauses.rootCause: Engineering artifacts were not connected through one versioned recalculable provenance graph.
rootCauses.unsuccessfulMethod: Use isolated links or prose to reconstruct engineering history.
rootCauses.successfulMethod: Build a deterministic twelve-stage provenance graph from exact objects, structured markers, canonical fields, and durable references.
rootCauses.preventionControl: Trusted governance validates graph schema, digest, repository-owned references, legal transitions, and linked finding coverage.
